name: generate-whatsapp-link
title: Generate WhatsApp Link
description: Type or paste any phone number — local, international, or formatted — and instantly open a WhatsApp chat without saving the contact. Handles country codes, strips formatting, and copies the wa.me link to clipboard.
author: laura_carta

preferences.name: defaultCountryCode
preferences.title: Default Country Code
preferences.description: Your country calling code (digits only, no +). Used to complete local numbers that have no country code. Example: 55 for Brazil, 1 for USA/Canada, 44 for UK.

commands.name: generate-whatsapp-link
commands.title: Generate WhatsApp Link
commands.description: Open a WhatsApp chat from any phone number format. Strips spaces, dashes, and parentheses, prepends your default country code for local numbers, and opens wa.me directly.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
